scripts.dev: concurrently --names "ACADEMIC,LIBRARY,LABS,CORE,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,yellow,cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix academic-record" "npm run dev --prefix backend-library" "npm run dev --prefix backend-laboratories" "npm run dev --prefix core-dwh" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard-dwh"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix academic-record && npm install --prefix backend-library && npm install --prefix backend-laboratories && npm install --prefix core-dwh && npm install --prefix dashboard-dwh
